split.title: Split into separate files
split.intro: Your document has <0>{{count}} pages</0>. Type the page numbers where a <1>new file</1> should start after.
split.example: Example: entering <0>3, 7</0> on a 10-page PDF makes 3 files: pages 1–3, 4–7 and 8–10.
split.label: Split after page(s)
split.invalid: Ignoring {{invalid}} — split points must be between 1 and {{max}}.
split.needPoints: Add at least one split point to divide the PDF into 2 or more files.

extract.title: Extract pages to a new file
extract.intro: Your document has <0>{{count}} pages</0>. Type the pages you want to pull out — they'll be saved as a new file. Your working set stays unchanged.
extract.example: Use commas for single pages and a dash for a range. Example: <0>1-3, 5, 8</0> keeps pages 1, 2, 3, 5 and 8. The order you type is the order they'll appear.
extract.label: Pages to extract
extract.hint: Enter page numbers above (between 1 and {{max}}) to choose what to extract.
extract.needPages: Choose at least one page to extract.
